self.description: The URL of the user in the REST API.

accountId.description: The account ID of the user, which uniquely identifies the user across all Atlassian products.

emailAddress.description: The email address of the user (may not be available depending on privacy settings).

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

active.description: Whether the user account is active.

timeZone.description: The time zone of the user.
